SEARCH
Package com.langfuse.client.resources.commons.types

Class Observation.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.langfuse.client.resources.commons.types.Observation.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Observation._FinalStage, Observation.EnvironmentStage, Observation.IdStage, Observation.InputStage, Observation.LevelStage, Observation.MetadataStage, Observation.ModelParametersStage, Observation.OutputStage, Observation.StartTimeStage, Observation.TypeStage, Observation.UsageStage
Enclosing class:
Observation
public static final class Observation.Builder extends Object implements Observation.IdStage, Observation.TypeStage, Observation.StartTimeStage, Observation.ModelParametersStage, Observation.InputStage, Observation.MetadataStage, Observation.OutputStage, Observation.UsageStage, Observation.LevelStage, Observation.EnvironmentStage, Observation._FinalStage

    • environment

      public Observation._FinalStage environment(@NotNull String environment)

      The environment from which this observation originated. Can be any lowercase alphanumeric string with hyphens and underscores that does not start with 'langfuse'.

      The environment from which this observation originated. Can be any lowercase alphanumeric string with hyphens and underscores that does not start with 'langfuse'.

      Specified by:
      environment in interface Observation.EnvironmentStage
      Returns:
      Reference to this so that method calls can be chained together.

    • costDetails

      public Observation._FinalStage costDetails(String key, Double value)

      The cost details of the observation. Key is the name of the cost metric, value is the cost in USD. The total key is the sum of all (non-total) cost metrics or the total value ingested.

      Specified by:
      costDetails in interface Observation._FinalStage
      Returns:
      Reference to this so that method calls can be chained together.

    • putAllCostDetails

      public Observation._FinalStage putAllCostDetails(Map<String,Double> costDetails)

      The cost details of the observation. Key is the name of the cost metric, value is the cost in USD. The total key is the sum of all (non-total) cost metrics or the total value ingested.

      Specified by:
      putAllCostDetails in interface Observation._FinalStage
      Returns:
      Reference to this so that method calls can be chained together.

    • costDetails

      public Observation._FinalStage costDetails(Map<String,Double> costDetails)

      Specified by:
      costDetails in interface Observation._FinalStage

    • usageDetails

      public Observation._FinalStage usageDetails(String key, Integer value)

      The usage details of the observation. Key is the name of the usage metric, value is the number of units consumed. The total key is the sum of all (non-total) usage metrics or the total value ingested.

      Specified by:
      usageDetails in interface Observation._FinalStage
      Returns:
      Reference to this so that method calls can be chained together.
